workloads.name: buffer-upload 1KB
workloads.description: Single upload command used to align with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 1KB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides.

workloads.name: matrix-vector multiply 32768x2048 f32 (naive swizzle0)
workloads.description: Matrix-vector compute kernel aligned to Dawn MatrixVectorMultiplyPerf dimensions (Rows=32768, Cols=2048, F32/F32, Impl=Naive, Swizzle=0, 100 dispatches).
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched matrix-vector dimensions, implementation, and 100-dispatch step structure against Dawn MatrixVectorMultiplyPerf F32/F32 Naive Swizzle=0 variant.

timingNormalization.note: Fawn matvec command executes repeat=100 dispatches in one command; normalize to per-dispatch to match Dawn wall_time units.

reasons: right timing class is process-wall, required operation
left/right timing class mismatch: operation vs process-wall

workloads.name: texture sampling/raster (directional)
workloads.description: Directional texture/raster workload combining a real texture-sampling kernel dispatch plus a raster proxy dispatch.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Directional only: Dawn workload includes render-pass sampling/raster transitions; Fawn runs texture sampling through compute and uses a dispatch proxy for raster/blending behavior.
